SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S ON MOTION TO OCT-01, 2025 @ 10:00 AM BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. THIS IS A MULTI-PARTY CASE; ONE OF THE PARTIES HAS FILED A CASE IN THE SUPERIOR COURT. ONE OF THE PARTIES REQUESTED TO CONSOLIDATE THE THREE CASES (2 ARE FILED - SMALL CLAIMS COURT). THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER TO ALLOW THE PARTIES REQUEST CONSOLIDATION FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT JUDGE WHO IS ASSIGNED TO THE UNLIMITED CASE CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASKALEVICH, TATSIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALCALA VAZQUEZ, ALEJANDRO AKA ALEX ALCALA MAYFIELD, IMANI PENTIC, NADJA THE PARTIES FAILED TO SHOW THAT THERE WAS A CONTRACT BETWEEN THEM OR IF DEFENDANT HAD A CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF'S DESIGNER. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT HER SINK AND FAUCETS COULD FIT WITHIN THE 24" ALOTTED BY HER DESIGNER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ALCALA VAZQUEZ, ALEJANDRO AKA ALEX ALCALA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MASKALEVICH, TATSIANA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
